verdict_note: STR fails 3/3 at 375 px (P0); also introduces NEW REGRESSION at 1280 px (was 0.064 PASS, now 0.107 FAIL)

build.pr_build: PR #2292 head SHA f131d346 — confirmed deployed (footer build string verified)

regression_issues.note: Previously-passing desktop viewport now fails; PR refactor (subgrid + container queries) introduced new shifts

business_rules_status.BL-UI-001: FAIL on /account/lists — CLS exceeds 0.10 budget at all three measured viewports

deterministic_signal: 375 px CLS identical to 16 sig figs across 3 runs (0.2555041975308642) — points at fixed-count skeleton-vs-list mismatch, not jitter
root_cause_hypothesis: Skeleton renders 5 fixed placeholders (v-for="item in 5") but test account has 9 wishlists; skeleton-to-content swap grows document by ~4 card-heights. PR addressed per-card height parity but not per-list count parity.
recommendation_for_dev: Render skeleton with n = actual_wishlist_count placeholders (or reserve min-height proportional to count). Re-measure on an account with >=9 wishlists at all three viewports; 1280 px must return to <=0.10 before merge.
jira_transition: None — comment-only (left at Testing per user instruction)
